title: Adams History Repeats DotS or Not
display_title: Adams History Repeats DotS or Not
wikitext:
[]: Adam's History Repeats, DotS or Not.             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:25 pm I just realized I came up with something related to Evangelion theorizing while falling asleep one night, and am trying to type it out to the best of my memory. Remember how it seemed so awesome that Unit 02's battle with Unit 01 seemed to parallel the Duel of the Seeds four billion years ago? And then it was kind of disappointing when Duel of the Seeds turned out not to have happened, as Adam was impaled by vis own Spear? Well, I realized this after a recent 24' rewatching: Kaworu is Adam, right? And he chose his own death because he felt the Lilim deserved to be the ones to live? It's the same thing that happened before! The Spear felt that it was the Lilim who deserved to live... you know... so... it's the same... again... Ah, screw it. It seemed to be a big thing when I was half-asleep. I'm still going to post it, though, considering I've typed so much text.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:27 pm Alright NAveryW-kun (if that is REALLY you), what government experiment have you partaken in where you suddenly start understanding everything about Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:27 pm What are you smoking NAvery? I want some. Seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:32 pm Sinus medication, probably.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:34 pm NAveryW wrote: Sinus medication, probably.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:36 pm Nasacort AQ, the entire bottle all at once. Probably...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:37 pm How should I know? I'm high on sinus medication .

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:40 pm NAveryW wrote: How should I know? I'm high on sinus medication .

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:42 pm NAveryW wrote: How should I know? I'm high on sinus medication .

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:44 pm BrikHaus wrote: NAveryW wrote: How should I know? I'm high on sinus medication .

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:47 pm People call me weird....

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:47 pm TURN ON TUNE IN DROP OUT

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:49 pm STOP, DAVE...DAAAIIISY....DAAAAIISY.... (Get it? 'Cause you're the Hal E. Burton 9000? Hal 9000?...ah, fuck it.)

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:51 pm NO I think the spirit of Groucho Marx is beginning to control me. :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Sep 21, 2007 10:51 pm And that meaning is some times its best to scrap an online handle and start from scratch or at least don't wright the whole thing up and post it on-line. It might get quoted by a few people and you'll get made fun of.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Sep 21, 2007 11:01 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: NO I think the spirit of Groucho Marx is beginning to control me. :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Sep 21, 2007 11:17 pm I never really got into the mythology behind duel of the seeds or whatnot, but this is a cool idea, and it makes sense from what i've heard. Simple, yet brilliant, and it fits with the OSHIT PARALLELISM EVERYWHERE theme of NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Sep 21, 2007 11:18 pm I thought Duel of the Seeds theory was ultimately killed by it's creator, Reichu.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Sep 21, 2007 11:21 pm Yeah, DotS isn't seriously considered anymore. It started when some of the CI was translated and theorizing started, but it was discarded when the rest of the CI was finished being translated and it turned out Lilith didn't stab Adam; Adam's Spear stabbed Adam of its own will.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Sep 21, 2007 11:23 pm BrikHaus wrote: I thought Duel of the Seeds theory was ultimately killed by it's creator, Reichu.
